free_text: INDC(CCP)-235 VOL II
Engl.translation of C,83KIEV,2,290,1983.
High precision prompt neutrons spectra measurement
for neutrons from Cf-252, U-233, U-235, Pu-239
fission in the energy range 2. - 11. MeV .
Flight base is 6.11 m, time resolution 5 nsec.
For neutron spectrum measurement.
Plastic scintillator of 200 mm diameter, 120mm height.
Four fission chambers for fission fragments.
Registration efficiency : Cf-252 - 98+-2 %,
Layers of 20 mm diameter on stainless steel of 0.04 mm
thickness, 25 mm diameter.
Error in the zero-time determination 0.3 nsec.
Error in the flight base determination 2 mm.
Error in the value-of-channel determination
Starostov, 1985-06
From authors.
Date is corrected
M.M. Subent 8 was corrected.
Free text was corrected to be human-readable.
BIB information was added.
Reactions were corrected according to memo
ERR-5 - ERR-7 were move in free text.
Ref.of Engl.translation was added.

Sum of statistical error, error due to the
random coincidence in the detectors, error
due to the recycling neutrons,error due to
the experimental hall background .
Error due to the flight time uncertainty .
Caused by the neutron scattering on
the detector walls and on the air atoms.
Error caused by the detector efficiency
uncertainty .

respectively.
